source.title: Rx Request — Lisinopril 20mg refill (auto-eligible)
source.body: Refill request for lisinopril 20mg daily. Surescripts protocol checks: last appt within 12mo (3/15/2026), future appt scheduled (10/15/2026), dx HTN active on problem list. All criteria met → 365-day refill, dx-associated, cosign Davis.

nurseNote:
Pattern 11 ADMINISTRATIVE — Layer 1 agent surface. Per design Section 4, this is NOT a v1 nurse-facing card; it is a background process that prevents cards from existing. Surfaced here only as a placeholder card for the 4-pane shell to demonstrate the visual scaffold; in v1.5+ the auto-clear is invisible to the nurse unless flagged.

No nurse action required. Audit trail logged.

mychart.subject: Refill processed
mychart.body:
Your lisinopril 20 mg refill has been sent to your pharmacy. No clinic action needed.

Brandon Sterne, RN BSN / Cardiology Associates

orderPad.note: Pattern 11 — Layer 1 agent. Not a v1 nurse-facing card; placeholder only.
